ai.error: OPENAI_API_KEY or LLM_MODEL is not configured

"CVE-2026-11979", "ids": [{"system_name": "SUSE CVE Page", "text": "https://www.suse.com/security/cve/CVE-2026-11979"}], "notes": [{"category": "general", "text": "libxml2 is vulnerable to multiple stack-based buffer overflows in the xmlcatalog utility when running in --shell mode. The usershell() function processes user input using fixed-size stack buffers without proper bounds checking.
By supplying an overly long input line, an attacker can overflow internal buffers (command, arg, and argv) during input parsing. This results in memory corruption within the stack frame.
Successful exploitation may cause a crash or potentially allow arbitrary code execution in the context of the xmlcatalog process.

This issue has been fixed in the commit c2e233fc.

NOTE:
The maintainers of this project did not agree that this issue is a vulnerability and considered it a bug.", "title": "CVE description"}], "product_status": {"recommended": ["SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:libxml2-2-2.9.4-46.102.2.aarch64", "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:libxml2-2-2.9.4-46.102.2.ppc64le", "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:libxml2-2-2.9.4-46.102.2.s390x", "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:libxml2-2-2.9.4-46.102.2.x86_64", "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:libxml2-2-32bit-2.9.4-46.102.2.s390x", "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:libxml2-2-32bit-2.9.4-46.102.2.x86_64", "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:libxml2-devel-2.9.4-46.102.2.aarch64", "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:libxml2-devel-2.9.4-46.102.2.ppc64le", "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:libxml2-devel-2.9.4-46.102.2.s390x", "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:libxml2-devel-2.9.4-46.102.2.x86_64", "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:libxml2-doc-2.9.4-46.102.2.noarch", "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:libxml2-tools-2.9.4-46.102.2.aarch64", "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:libxml2-tools-2.9.4-46.102.2.ppc64le", "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:libxml2-tools-2.9.4-46.102.2.s390x", "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:libxml2-tools-2.9.4-46.102.2.x86_64", "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:python-libxml2-2.9.4-46.102.2.aarch64", "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:python-libxml2-2.9.4-46.102.2.ppc64le", "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:python-libxml2-2.9.4-46.102.2.s390x", "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5-LTSS:python-libxml2-2.9.4-46.102.2.x86_64", "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP5:

fixed_versions: To install this SUSE Security Update use the SUSE recommended installation methods like YaST online_update or "zypper patch".

title: Security update for libxml2
